items.name: Lucky Egg 🍀🥚
items.description:
code: LCG
Originally sold in: https://www.roblox.com/games/15108736400/Flex-UGC-Codes

Collab item between daa9n and CFLugc.
Unfortunately, CFLugc still didn't pay a single robux/dollar, so he received only 3 stock.
His stock was meant to be code drops for the UGC collectors and other people, but he used it for his own purposes like code trades.

No collabs with CFLugc again.
